title: K-200 Integration Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Integration Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-485-A. Revision: A. Type: analysis. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2023-09-03. Last modified: 2024-02-07. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1090.
